title: HTTP limit_reqs
description: Status data for all HTTP limit_req zones.

passed.description: The total number of requests that were neither limited nor accounted as limited.

delayed.description: The total number of requests that were delayed.

rejected.description: The total number of requests that were rejected.

delayed_dry_run.description: The total number of requests accounted as delayed in the dry run mode.

rejected_dry_run.description: The total number of requests accounted as rejected in the dry run mode.
